Subject: new email address!
Message:
Hi Guys!
I just wanted to let you know that I have a new email address.  I quit Aerotek (finally!!) and start a new position on June 11.  I am going to be working at Smith and Associates doing corporate recruiting.  I am very excited!  I think things will be much better for me.  Anyways- this will be my temporary email, and when I get set up at my new position I will send out my new email.  But for now-I can be reached on my hotmail account.  I hope you are all doing well and talk to you soon!
Laura
